Title: Marcel the Shell with Shoes On
Writer: Dean Fleischer Camp, Jenny Slate, Nick Paley
Actors: Jenny Slate, Dean Fleischer Camp, Isabella Rossellini
Plot: A cash-strapped documentary maker decides to make his newest documentary about a mollusk shell he finds living in his Airbnb with his friends.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 38 wins & 67 nominations total
